title: [$250] Investigate migration to native BootSplash animation on Android

labels.name: External
labels.description: Added to denote the issue can be worked on by a contributor

labels.name: Daily
labels.description: KSv2

labels.name: Help Wanted
labels.description: Apply this label when an issue is open to proposals by contributors

labels.name: Bug
labels.description: Something is broken. Auto assigns a BugZero manager.

body:
### Problem Profiling on Android release builds [shows](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues/77171#issuecomment-4084140609) potentially 1 second spent on splash screen setup: > ~0.5s to initialise the OD part and start opening the ReactNativeFragment > ~0.3s to initialise the ReactNative fragment and reach our [index.js](https://github.com/Expensify/App/blob/main/index.js) > 0.25 to show the BootSplash hiding animation ([here](https://github.com/Expensify/App/blob/8e656552c4738504a99961a9227812cc4c16c06a/src/components/SplashScreenHider/index.native.tsx#L48)). We [collect](https://github.com/Expensify/App/blob/8e656552c4738504a99961a9227812cc4c16c06a/src/Expensify.tsx#L197) spans in onSplashHide, which is called after the animation ### Solution Investigate further
Issue OwnerCurrent Issue Owner: @ZhenjaHorbach

title: [$250] Investigate ManualAppStartup zombie spans inflating average duration

labels.name: External
labels.description: Added to denote the issue can be worked on by a contributor

labels.name: Daily
labels.description: KSv2

labels.name: Help Wanted
labels.description: Apply this label when an issue is open to proposals by contributors

labels.name: Bug
labels.description: Something is broken. Auto assigns a BugZero manager.

body:
### Problem The average ManualAppStartup span duration is higher than it realistically is due to outliers exceeding 24 hours. This suggests some spans are never being closed, severely inflating the metric. ### Solution We need to: 1. Identify why some ManualAppStartup spans run indefinitely instead of closing normally 2. Fix the root cause (missing span end calls, error paths that skip cleanup, etc.) 3. Verify the average duration drops to a reasonable range after the fix
Issue OwnerCurrent Issue Owner: @aimane-chnaif

title: [$250] Description field does not auto-focus when the page opens

labels.name: External
labels.description: Added to denote the issue can be worked on by a contributor

labels.name: Daily
labels.description: KSv2

labels.name: Help Wanted
labels.description: Apply this label when an issue is open to proposals by contributors

labels.name: Bug
labels.description: Something is broken. Auto assigns a BugZero manager.

labels.name: Melvin Triage
labels.description: Automatic AI Analysis of an issue

body:
## Description The description/merchant/comment field does not auto-focus when the page opens. It only receives focus once the user moves their mouse. ## Expected Behavior The description/merchant/comment field should auto-focus immediately when the page opens, without requiring any mouse movement. ## Actual Behavior The description/merchant/comment field does not have focus when the page opens. Focus is only applied once the user moves their mouse. ## Steps to Reproduce 1. Navigate to an expense 2. Observe that the comment field does not have focus 3. Move the mouse or press any button 4. Observe that the comment field now receives focus 5. Click on the description or merchant field 6. Observe that the description/merchant field does not have focus 7. Move the mouse or press any button 8. Observe that the description/merchant field now receives focus ## Platform Not yet determined — needs investigation.
